# Brutalism Admin Kit

Neo-brutalist admin dashboard template built with neobrutalism-ui-react.

Created by [rahmatez](https://github.com/rahmatez).

## Features
- 10 dashboard variants
- 40+ application pages
- 6 sidebar layouts
- Command palette and responsive design

## Links
- Demo: http://localhost:5174
- Docs: /docs/introduction
- Component Library: https://neo-brutalism-react-docs.vercel.app/
- Author: https://github.com/rahmatez
